queries.question: What if stop 20006 must be served by bus 2 instead of bus 3?
queries.note: Dispatcher wants to spread load — move 20006 from bus 3 to bus 2

queries.question: Can you put stop 20001 on bus 0? Bus 3 is getting too many stops
queries.note: Fuzzy. Bus 0 at capacity (100/100) — agent must also override capacity for this stop

queries.question: What if stop 20004 must be served by bus 2?
queries.note: Move disruption stop from bus 3 to bus 2

queries.question: Route stop 20007 through bus 0 please, it's closer to its other stops
queries.note: Fuzzy. Bus 0 at capacity — agent must override capacity for this stop

queries.question: What if stop 20002 must be served by bus 2?
queries.note: Move disruption stop to lightly loaded bus 2

queries.question: What if stop 20011 must not be served by bus 3?
queries.note: Force 20011 off bus 3 to another bus

queries.question: I don't want bus 3 picking up stop 20007, it's too far for that route
queries.note: Fuzzy. Dispatcher's geographic concern

queries.question: What if stop 20004 must not be served by bus 3?
queries.note: Force redistribution of 20004

queries.question: Keep stop 20001 off bus 3
queries.note: Direct. Force 20001 to bus 0 or 2

queries.question: What if stop 20006 must not be served by bus 0?
queries.note: 20006 is on bus 3, not bus 0 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: What if bus 3 can only carry 30 students?
queries.note: Bus 3 has 59 students from 6 stops — must shed ~half

queries.question: Bus 3 is a smaller vehicle, limit it to 40 students
queries.note: Fuzzy. Bus 3 has 59 students — shed some

queries.question: What if bus 3 capacity is reduced to 45?
queries.note: Bus 3 has 59 students — must shed ~14 students (1-2 stops)

queries.question: What if we limit bus 3 to 50 students max?
queries.note: Bus 3 has 59 — shed 1-2 stops

queries.question: Set bus 3 max capacity to 55
queries.note: Direct. Bus 3 has 59 students — shed 1 small stop

queries.question: What if stop 20001 must be served before stop 20004?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 — ordering within reassigned route

queries.question: Pick up 20002 before 20007 on their route
queries.note: Fuzzy. Both on bus 3

queries.question: What if stop 20006 must be served before stop 20011?
queries.note: Both on bus 3

queries.question: The school needs stop 20004 picked up before 20001
queries.note: Fuzzy. Both on bus 3 — opposite of natural order

queries.question: What if stop 20007 must be served before stop 20002?
queries.note: Both on bus 3

queries.question: What if stops 20002 and 20004 must be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both already on bus 3 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: Kids at stop 20001 and 20006 are neighbors, they should ride together
queries.note: Fuzzy. Both on bus 3 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: What if stops 20007 and 20011 must be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: Make sure stops 20002 and 20006 stay on the same bus
queries.note: Fuzzy. Both on bus 3 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: What if stops 20001 and 20007 must be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 — trivially satisfied

queries.question: What if stops 20001 and 20002 must not be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 → forces one to move to bus 0 or 2

queries.question: There's a conflict between kids at 20004 and 20007, keep them on separate buses
queries.note: Fuzzy. Both on bus 3 → forces separation

queries.question: What if stops 20006 and 20011 must not be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 → forces separation

queries.question: Separate stops 20001 and 20004 onto different buses
queries.note: Direct. Both on bus 3 → forces separation

queries.question: What if stops 20002 and 20007 must not be on the same bus?
queries.note: Both on bus 3 → forces separation

queries.question: What if bus 3 can serve at most 3 stops?
queries.note: Bus 3 has 6 disruption stops → must shed 3

queries.question: Due to time constraints, bus 3 should not make more than 4 pickups
queries.note: Fuzzy. Bus 3 has 6 → shed 2

queries.question: What if bus 2 can serve at most 4 stops?
queries.note: Bus 2 has 3 stops — trivially satisfied

queries.question: Limit bus 3 to picking up no more than 5 stops
queries.note: Fuzzy. Bus 3 has 6 → shed 1

queries.question: What if bus 3 can serve at most 4 stops?
queries.note: Bus 3 has 6 → must shed 2 to bus 2
